name: synetairismos-astynomikon-offers
description: Static GitHub Pages site for Synetelas offers.

scripts.build: npm run build:images && tailwindcss -i ./assets/css/tailwind.input.css -o ./assets/css/tailwind.css --minify && npm run build:icons && npm run build:css && npm run build:stamp-assets
scripts.check: node ./scripts/check-tailwind-build.mjs && html-validate index.html && node ./scripts/check-javascript.mjs && node ./scripts/check-repo-clean.mjs && node ./scripts/check-static-assets.mjs && node ./scripts/check-performance-assets.mjs
